name: vuln-analysis
description: Automated security vulnerability verification and exploitation pipeline for Claude Code

metadata.description: A Claude plugin that automates the full vulnerability analysis lifecycle: target extraction, environment setup (Docker/conda/venv), vulnerability scanning with 3-phase false positive filtering, PoC script generation, containerized reproduction with retry loops, type-specific validation, and comprehensive Markdown/JSON report delivery. Supports 10 vulnerability types including RCE, SSRF, path traversal, XSS, command injection, and more.
